description_long: This object is a rectangular, golden-brown pastry with a slightly domed top and rounded edges, resembling a pain au chocolat. The surface is glossy and displays a delicate, flaky texture with visible layers, especially at the ends where the pastry is rolled. Dark spots at the ends suggest the presence of chocolate filling, typical of a chocolate croissant. The crust appears crisp and slightly uneven, with some areas more browned than others, indicating a well-baked exterior. The pastry's size and shape are consistent with a hand-held bakery item, likely made from laminated dough. There are no visible toppings such as seeds or sugar on the surface.
description: A golden-brown, glossy, rectangular croissant with a flaky, layered surface and visible chocolate filling at the ends.
description_view_0: The side view shows the smooth, slightly domed top and the even, golden-brown crust with minimal visible filling.
description_view_1: This end view highlights the rolled layers and a dark spot of chocolate filling emerging from the pastry.
description_view_2: The opposite side view displays a similar golden, flaky surface with a subtle sheen and no visible filling.
description_view_3: The other end view reveals more pronounced chocolate filling and the spiral layering of the pastry.
